databaseBackupMethod: Managed PostgreSQL snapshots plus pg_dump SQL dumps
databaseBackupSchedule: Hourly incremental, daily full, weekly, monthly
databaseBackupLocation: Primary database backup location or provider
assetsBackupLocation: Storage bucket backup or archive location for public/media assets
offsiteBackupLocation: Separate cloud or offline media location
schedulerEvidence: Cron entry, platform scheduler, or Windows Task Scheduler export
dnsBackupLocation: Registrar, DNS zone export, or Cloudflare backup location
businessLogicBackupLocation: Backup location for SEO architecture, templates, mappings, and strategy docs
